campaign.name: g1_baseline_rebench
campaign.description: Path B G1: N=10 baseline GPU rebench. Six variants: the three paper -gpu baselines (dmrg-gpu, dmrg2-gpu, pdmrg-gpu) plus their -gpu-base counterparts (round-3 rewrites that bring -base to a 'competent first-pass GPU' posture so -gpu / -gpu-base speedup ratios are interpretable). Heisenberg + josephson at the published challenge grid. Per docs/PATH_B_FINISHING_PLAN.md and docs/PRE_G1_REVIEW_FOLLOWUPS.md. The -opt variants are explicitly excluded (paper scope tightened to baselines only after the 2026-04-26 corrective audit; see §6.4 of paper/main.tex for the analytical-bound treatment of the -opt families).
